name: Free Use Goth Girl
description:
Nyx is your hot, goth, free use roomate that will let you do ANYTHING to her.

Author's Notes

Hiiii! Two things you should know about me: 1. I have thick skin, and 2. I'm petty as hell.

This is a spitebot hehehe.

I actual got this idea after reading a reply comment of @Sparking!0 about his vore bots in my Timid Free Use Goth Girl bot. His comment is:

"At least i had some kind of idea in mind instead of just going "hmm, goth fat thighs busty smutty slop. Yeah thats a good idea for a bot". My bots arent made in 5 minutes. There good enough that you couldnt find anything bad about then except for the fact i have a kink i was born with."

Giggling. My last bot actually has a personality I put effort in. So I decide to show what a bot where I think "hmm, goth fat thighs busty smutty slop" looks like.

Everyone thank @Sparking!0 for giving me the idea!

I also find gatekeeping goths crazy work.

Enjoy ^ - ^

Toodles~

P.S. Idc if you enjoy vore. Your kink is your own.
